headline: What Boeing (BA)'s US$2 Billion MUOS Defense Deal Means For Shareholders
summary: Boeing recently secured a US$2.00 billion fixed‑price incentive contract from Space Systems Command for Phase II of the Mobile User Objective System satellite service‑life extension program, covering design, development, production, launch support, and on‑orbit testing of two MUOS satellites through to a planned completion in 2035. This long‑dated defense space award deepens Boeing’s government satellite workload and further balances its exposure between commercial aviation and military...
